title: Majorette Grand Series SOS FMX Fire Ladder Die-Cast Fire Engine - 1:43 Scale - Batteries Included
features: Realistic Majorette Land Rover Defender Police Vehicle – The Land Rover Defender Police Vehicle Includes Light And Sound Effects (Siren) And Extra Accessories With Numerous Functions. Equipped To Respond To All Emergencies

High Quality Design – The Red Fire Engine Features Rotating Wheels, Soft Rubber Tyres With A Tread Pattern, Transparent Windows That Reveal The Detailed Interior, A Telescopic Turntable Ladder With A Cage And Extinguishing Nozzle, And Many Other Detailed Features. The Driver’S Cab And Platform Covers Are Made Of Metal, And The Other Parts Are Made From Plastic
New Larger Size – The Majorette Volvo Fire Engine Comes In New Larger Scale Design Of 1:43 Scale. This Makes This An Adaptable Toy For Your Child To Play With

Collectable Item – Discover All The Models From The Majorette Grand Series In Our New And Larger 1:43 Scale. Choose From Emergency Service, Construction, Or City Vehicles – The Exciting New Functions And Intricately Detailed Designs Are Guaranteed To Keep Young Children Entertained

Suitable For Indoor And Outdoor Use - Suitable For Indoor And Outdoor Use, This Toy Vehicle Allows Youngsters To Immerse Themselves In The World Of A Firefighter And Learn About The Functions Of A Fire Engine
description: From the manufacturer Majorette Volvo fire engine – Off to the rescue! Many children dream of joining the fire brigade. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use, this toy vehicle allows youngsters to immerse themselves in the world of a firefighter and learn about the functions of a fire engine. The red fire engine features rotating wheels and is easy for young children to manoeuvre. It also has a siren and flashing lights to alert nearby traffic. The original model comes with soft rubber tyres with a tread pattern, transparent windows that reveal the detailed interior, a telescopic turntable ladder with a cage and extinguishing nozzle, and many other detailed features. The driver’s cab and platform covers are made of metal, and the other parts are made from plastic. Discover all the models from the Majorette Grand Series in our new and larger 1:43 scale. Choose from emergency service, construction or city vehicles – the exciting new functions and intricately detailed designs will keep young children entertained.
